title: Staff Labor Roster
purpose: Master labor pool for Comeketo Catering events — who to call, by tag, affiliation, availability, referral chain, and working-relationship status. This is the operational answer to 'who can I put on the schedule for Saturday?'

source.file: rawdata/Labor available for Comeketo Catering - Staff - Employee list - people to work - Sheet1.csv
original_columns: Problemic - how easy it is to work with this person
source.import_note: Only name, phone, and scattered free-text notes were populated in the source. Skill/capability columns were empty for all rows at import. Unknown fields omitted rather than guessed. Portuguese-language notes preserved verbatim with brief English gloss in parentheses.

status_vocabulary.active: Has worked events; fine to call.
status_vocabulary.untested: On the list but has not actually worked an event yet, or scheduled once and no-showed.
status_vocabulary.unavailable: Previously active, now reduced availability or retired from the pool.
status_vocabulary.do_not_contact: Relationship broken; owner explicitly marked as 'do not want to return.'

tag_vocabulary.chef: Full chef-level; can lead a kitchen.
tag_vocabulary.captain: Leader of a job — runs the day-of crew.
tag_vocabulary.lea_decor: Affiliated with LEA Decor (decor partner that sub-supplies labor).
tag_vocabulary.overflow_partner: Not staff — a decor/logistics partner we call when the core roster is full.

captains.name: Bibi
notes: Weekly prep list in rawdata is tagged BIBI — she runs the prep pipeline.

captains.name: Rodrigo
notes: Principal / owner of Comeketo Catering. Distinct from 'Rodrigo HHS' (labor pool, different phone).
Core relationship per north_star — not just a captain. Deserves a full people/rodrigo.json once other sources enrich his record.

known_data_issues: Marcelene (774-300-2206, LEA Decor) and Marcilene (774-300-2206, referred by Filipe LEA) share a phone number. Likely the same person; treat both rows as potentially duplicate until confirmed with Rodrigo.
Ashley Ramirez appears in the Captains section with '??' next to her name in the source — captain status not yet confirmed.
David, Daniel Consultor, and the second Angela have no phone numbers. Cannot schedule until contact info is filled in.
Two 'Rodrigo' entries exist: the principal/owner (508-561-2986, captain) and 'Rodrigo HHS' (508-826-2849, labor pool). Must be kept separate in any downstream agent work.
Patty Elworthy's 'call her last week of July' is a seasonal reminder from a prior import cycle. Year unspecified in source — do not auto-schedule without confirming.
downstream_notes: When building people/*.json records for captains, pull fuller context from the Sales Playbook, the Comeketo Welcome deck, and the Partnership Program doc before committing a relationship_weight and handling{} block. This roster alone is thin on voice / preferred-channel data.
Consider deriving a lightweight view: 'who-can-do-bar', 'who-is-available-weekends', 'who-to-call-for-overflow' — these are the three queries Rodbot will face most often when asked about staffing.
